user.title: Add a VisiblAir sensor
user.description: Paste the sensor's MAC address and viewToken. Both values appear in the public-viewer URL the VisiblAir portal generates for each sensor: https://public.visiblair.com/index.html?id=MAC&viewToken=TOKEN

reauth_confirm.title: VisiblAir credentials need updating
reauth_confirm.description: The viewToken for sensor {uuid} no longer works. Generate a new Public-view link from the VisiblAir portal and paste the updated viewToken.

error.invalid_mac: MAC address must be six colon-separated hex bytes (e.g. 30:C6:F7:25:C4:A0).
error.invalid_auth: The MAC + viewToken combination was rejected by VisiblAir. Double-check the public-viewer URL.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the VisiblAir API. Check internet connectivity and try again.

abort.already_configured: This VisiblAir sensor is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the cloud API. Sensors emit a new sample every 60 s by default, so polling faster than that yields no new data.
